triggers.title: Trigger times
triggers.description: Set the time for fixed triggers, or the offset (in minutes, signed) for sunrise/sunset triggers.

confirm_no_presence.title: No presence source detected
confirm_no_presence.description: You enabled "Run only when away" but no presence entity is configured and no person.* entity exists. The simulation will run anyway. Continue?

error.name_required: Choose a name for this instance.

abort.already_configured: An instance with this name is already configured.

triggers.title: Trigger times
triggers.description: Set the time for fixed triggers, or the offset (in minutes, signed) for sunrise/sunset triggers.

confirm_no_presence.title: No presence source detected
confirm_no_presence.description: You enabled "Run only when away" but no presence entity is configured and no person.* entity exists. The simulation will run anyway. Continue?

error.name_required: Choose a name for this instance.

run_now.name: Run now
run_now.description: Trigger an immediate opening or closing of the configured shutters, bypassing day, randomization and presence conditions.

action.name: Action
action.description: Whether to open or close the shutters.

pause.name: Pause
pause.description: Pause the simulation. Scheduled triggers are ignored until resumed.

resume.name: Resume
resume.description: Resume the simulation after a pause.
